info.title: Agent Utility API - AI Agent Optimized
info.description: High-traffic utility endpoints designed specifically for AI agents. Each endpoint is <1ms CPU time, making it 100x+ more efficient than LLM inference for these tasks.

x-agent-guidance.when_to_use: Use this API when you need fast, deterministic operations that would be slow or unreliable with LLM inference: slug generation, text normalization, format validation, geographic lookups, transliteration.
x-agent-guidance.pricing: x402 micropayments: $0.001 USDC per call on Base mainnet
x-agent-guidance.performance: All endpoints <1ms CPU time, <50ms total latency including network
x-agent-guidance.reliability: 99.9% uptime SLA, stateless design enables horizontal scaling

x402Payment.name: x-payment
x402Payment.description: USDC transaction hash on Base mainnet. Format: 0x followed by 64 hex characters. Recipient: 0x41A024c1C89Fd30122c8b184de99cbE751eaC970

multilingual_content.description: Creating Indian language content from English
steps: 1. Transliterate English to target script using /api/transliterate
2. Generate slug from transliterated text using /api/slug/generate
3. Validate slug for URL safety using /api/slug/validate
